name: circle-chart
title: BTCircleChart
description: Pie / donut / donut-rounded chart molecule rendered as custom SVG. Renders coloured sections with external badge labels showing the section letter and percentage. Hovering or tapping a section pops it outward and shows a floating BTTooltip, with a radial leader line from each section to its badge. Three visual variants selectable via the `variant` prop.

files.content:
export type { BTCircleSection } from './internal/chart.types';

export type BTCircleChartVariant = 'pie' | 'donut' | 'donutRounded';
